description:
Kling v1.6 video generation bot, hosted by fal.ai. For best results, upload an image attachment.

Optional parameters:
Set the aspect ratio. Allowed values are `16:9`, `9:16` and `1:1`. 
Duration` to set the duration of the generated video (5 or 10 seconds).
